title: New Hire Onboarding - Conclude Email
description: Email to notify the user that the onboarding process has finished

config.content:
New Hire Onboarding

Request Update

{{candidateName}},

You are all set for your start date !

Starting a new role can feel overwhelming, we understand. Hopefully, our onboarding was smooth for you as it made sure everything was taken care of in anticipation of your start.

 

Here's a rundown of what your day will look like, so you'll feel prepared:

✅ Before coming into our workplace, you need to register and update your COVID symptoms profile. This must be done daily prior to arrival. The process will send you a daily confirmation for you to show upon entry. Click here for more details.

✅ As an on-site worker, you have been assigned a working station.

✅Your manager is Manny Manager. He'll want to meet you and discuss your predefined development plan. He'll find you in the morning. 

✅Don't forget to have fun! Our HR intranet site lists all sorts of events and activities for you to pick up immediately. 

We hope this onboard experience made for a nice transition into your new role at Processmaker. A warm welcome aboard!

 

Sincerely,

 

Your new friends at Processmaker HR.
